data.jd_text:
Our client – operating in the
 **FMCG sector** 
 is looking for a Chief Technology Officer.
 



  





**The role will be
 
 physically located in Kuala Lumpur – Malaysia.**




  





**Job Summary:** 




***Responsible for architecting and delivering the Group’s end\-to\-end digital evolution across global trading, refinery, manufacturing, supply chain, warehousing, and distribution operations.***




***This role is created to reposition the Group from a traditional integrated commodity and FMCG player into a technology\-empowered, data\-intelligent and globally synchronized enterprise.***




  





**Primary responsibilities include:** 




**Enterprise Digital Transformation Leadership** 



* Design and execute a bold 5\-year Digital \& Technology Transformation Blueprint.
* Lead the enterprise\-wide modernization of legacy systems into integrated, scalable digital platforms while progressively embedding AI capabilities into core daily operations.
* Re\-architect technology to support global expansion and potential new market expansion using new cloud\-based technology with a global control tower dashboard for senior leadership based in HQ.
* Drive digitization across trading, manufacturing, and logistics operations.
* Transform IT from a support function into a strategic growth engine.



  





**Global ERP \& Systems Harmonization** 



* Lead proven, large\-scale ERP deployments across multi\-country operations.
* Standardize global business processes across:
* Trading \& commodity risk management
* Manufacturing \& production planning
* Inventory \& warehouse management
* Supply chain \& distribution
* Finance \& consolidation
* Distribution system and sales force automation for FMCG
* Build a single source of truth data platform across the Group.
* Implement global data governance and reporting architecture.
* Lead development of business dashboards for monitoring and tracking financial and operational KPIs.
* Reduce system fragmentation and manual reconciliation risks, replacing them with AI workflow orchestration solutions.



  





**Technology\-Enabled Trading \& Risk Excellence** 



* Digitally enhance commodity trading platforms with:
* Real\-time analytics
* Risk management dashboards
* Exposure visibility
* Margin intelligence tools
* Strengthen controls and governance to mitigate trading and compliance risks.
* Integrate finance, trading and supply chain data for unified visibility.



  





**AI, Data \& Advanced Analytics Strategy** 



* Establish a Group\-wide enterprise data architecture.
* Build advanced analytics capabilities across:
* Demand forecasting
* Procurement optimization
* Production efficiency
* Commodity pricing insights
* Drive AI adoption responsibly and strategically.
* Elevate executive decision\-making through real\-time dashboards.
* Champion adoption of an AI\-first mindset across all business units.



  





**Strategic Budgeting** 



* Own and optimize global technology CAPEX and OPEX budgets.
* Develop disciplined ROI\-driven investment frameworks.
* Prioritize digital investments aligned with business growth.
* Lead vendor strategy, contract negotiation and platform rationalization.
* Ensure every technology initiative delivers measurable value.



  





**Cybersecurity \& Enterprise Risk Governance** 



* Build a resilient cybersecurity framework across global operations.
* Strengthen disaster recovery and business continuity planning.
* Protect trading, financial and operational data integrity.
* Implement global compliance and regulatory frameworks.
* Conduct regular risk maturity assessments and audits.
* Prepare and operationalize IT Delegation of Authority for enhanced governance.



  





**Executive \& Board\-Level Leadership** 



* Serve as a strategic advisor to the Board on digital opportunities.
* Translate technology transformation into shareholder value.
* Partner with regional CEOs and senior leadership team.
* Influence digital culture across all geographies.



  





**Global Team Building \& Organizational Design** 



* Build a high\-caliber, future\-ready technology organization.
* Develop strong regional technology leadership bench strength.
* Introduce performance metrics aligned to business outcomes.
* Foster a culture of innovation, accountability and execution excellence.
* Attract global talent capable of operating in multi\-country environments.



  





**Role Requirements:** 



* 15–20\+ years of progressive technology leadership experience, including at least 8–10 years in executive roles such as IT Director, CIO or CTO.
* Proven experience leading multi\-country ERP implementations across trading, manufacturing, supply chain, warehousing, and distribution environments.
* Demonstrated success in enterprise\-wide digital transformation.
* Experience in AI and data strategy deployment.
* Executive gravitas and Board\-level influence.
* Proven ability to build and lead high\-performing global teams.
* Experience operating in emerging markets and complex, multi\-entity organizations is highly desirable.
* Relevant professional certifications in ERP platforms (e.g., SAP, Oracle, Microsoft Dynamics), enterprise architecture, cybersecurity governance, project management, and cloud technologies are strongly preferred.
* Executive education in digital strategy, Industry 4\.0, or corporate governance would further strengthen the profile.



  





**What's on offer:** 



* Monthly Salary: USD 9,000 \- 9,500/\- p.m. (Basic\+Housing\+Transporatation)
* Education allowance for children
* Family medical insurance
* Family air\-tickets
* Annual Performance Bonus

data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose**
**JOB DESCRIPTION**
 Supports the global execution, governance, and operational delivery of DP World’s Total Rewards frameworks across all regions.
   

  

 Responsible for managing the end\-to\-end total rewards cycle, HR cost controlling, and compensation structures, ensuring consistent and effective implementation of Total Rewards strategy across over 80 countries. Drives alignment, governance, and operational excellence across the Group, supporting business performance, internal equity, and market competitiveness.
   

  

 Acts as an extension of the Group SVP – Total Rewards for expertise and coordination of Total Rewards matters, translating strategic direction into scalable, controlled, and high\-impact programmes across the organisation.
   

  

**Key Accountabilities**
**Global Total Rewards Cycle Leadership**
 Lead governance and execution of the Group Total Rewards cycle.
   

  

* Leads the annual salary review and bonus processes across the Group
* Establish timelines, governance checkpoints, and approval frameworks
* Review and challenge regional submissions to ensure alignment with Group guidelines
* Ensure consistent application of pay\-for\-performance principles
* Consolidate outputs and provide insights to support decision\-making at Group level


**HR Cost Governance \& Workforce Cost Control**
 Have oversight on workforce\-related costs from a Total Rewards perspective, ensuring alignment with Group financial objectives and strategic priorities.
   

  

* Lead the payroll budgeting exercise for CHO, Global Logistics, Group Technology, and other operating entities.
* Provide visibility and analysis on workforce cost trends, including salary movements, merit increases, and structural cost implications
* Partner with Finance and HR leadership to support budgeting, forecasting, and cost planning processes
* Ensure Total Rewards decisions (e.g. salary reviews, structural changes) are aligned with approved budgets and cost guidelines
* Identify risks and opportunities related to workforce costs, providing insights and recommendations to support decision\-making
* Drive discipline and consistency in cost management across regions through governance frameworks and review processes
* Support evaluation of cost implications for organisational changes, transformation initiatives, and workforce planning


**Reward Governance \& Framework Implementation**
 Drive the implementation and ongoing governance of Group\-wide Total Rewards frameworks.
   

  

* Translate Total Rewards strategy into clear frameworks, processes, and operational models
* Ensure consistent application across regions while enabling appropriate flexibility
* Establish and maintain governance mechanisms to ensure compliance
* Act as a first escalation point for complex Total Rewards matters


**Change, Integration \& Strategic Initiatives**
* Support Total Rewards workstreams related to mergers, acquisitions, and organisational restructuring, including due diligence, impact assessment, and integration of Total Rewards frameworks
* Lead the implementation of Group Total Rewards initiatives (e.g. structural changes, global job architecture and catalogue evolution, compensation framework updates) in line with the strategic direction.
* Oversee continuous improvement of processes and systems to ensure efficiency, consistency, and scalability.


**Qualifications, Experience And Skills**
* Degree in HR, Finance, Economics, or related field
* Extensive experience in global compensation and reward (10\+ years)
* Deep expertise in job evaluation methodologies (Hay preferred)
* Strong experience managing global reward cycles in a multinational environment
* Advanced analytical and financial modelling capability
* Strong stakeholder management and influencing skills
* Proven ability to operate in complex, global environments
* Experience with HR systems (e.g. Oracle Fusion)


**About Us**
 Trade is the lifeblood of the global economy, creating opportunities and improving the quality of life for people around the world. DP World exists to make the world’s trade flow better, changing what’s possible for the customers and communities we serve globally.
   

  

 With a dedicated, diverse and professional team of more than 115,000 employees from 160 nationalities, spanning 78 countries on six continents, DP World is pushing trade further and faster towards a seamless supply chain that’s fit for the future.
   

  

 We’re rapidly transforming and integrating our businesses \-\- Ports and Terminals, Marine Services, Logistics and Technology – and uniting our global infrastructure with local expertise to create stronger, more efficient end\-to\-end supply chain solutions that can change the way the world trades.
   

  

 What's more, we're reshaping the future by investing in innovation. From intelligent delivery systems to automated warehouse stacking, we’re at the cutting edge of disruptive technology, pushing the sector towards better ways to trade, minimizing disruptions from the factory floor to the customer’s door.
   

  

 DP World is on a mission to transcend boundaries and bridge the gap between all nations and cultures – not just in what we do but also in how we behave.
   

  

 We are dedicated to creating a culture where everyone feels respected, supported, and empowered to reach their full potential. We believe that embracing inclusion and diversity, drives innovation and growth and helps us connect people, businesses, and societies. Free minds and different perspectives are changing our world, and together we can change what’s possible.
   

  

 WE MAKE TRADE FLOW
